## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content creation, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Rapid response to security threats is being optimized, aiming for 24-48 hour turnaround on relevant blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [New SEO opportunities identified: ISO certifications, threat intel themes (with caution), and leveraging product release information](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [SEO performance improving: clicks and impressions up 30%, with 200+ blog articles and 83 glossary pages published](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Mobile formatting issues on glossary pages need addressing to improve user experience and potentially SEO metrics](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

## Topics

### Rapid Response to Security Threats

  - [Piotrek and Callie working on optimizing rapid response to threat intel](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Aiming to publish content within 24-48 hours of a security event](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Caution needed when discussing attacks to avoid customer backlash](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Typical format: intro, attack analysis, example (if available), why it bypasses legacy tools, how Abnormal catches it, conclusion on behavioral AI necessity](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)

### New SEO Content Opportunities

  - [ISO certifications: potential for glossary or definition content](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Threat intel themes: careful approach needed, focusing on already published weekly attack reports](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Product release information: good source for specific keywords and validated Abnormal capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Social media distribution of threat intel content to be improved](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)

### SEO Performance Metrics

  - [Clicks and impressions up by nearly 30%](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [200+ blog articles and 83 editorial glossary pages published](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [11 new pages published yesterday, expected to boost metrics next week](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [50+ editorial ideas approved, with aim to maintain 100 approved ideas in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Focusing on top-of-funnel topics from 2021-2022](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [Prioritizing time-sensitive content (e.g., Black Friday)](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [Emily reviewing and categorizing refresh needs: some require minor SEO updates, others complete rewrites](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)

### Mobile Formatting Issues

  - [Glossary pages showing significant white space on mobile](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Potential negative impact on Google metrics (e.g., time to first text)](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Jennifer's team to be consulted for prioritizing and fixing the issue](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)

### LLM Mentions and Traffic

  - [New dashboard tab tracking referrals from AI sources (ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Traffic from AI sources relatively consistent](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [First mentions from GitHub Copilot observed](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)

### SEO Tool Integration

  - [SEMrush data showing improvement in blog performance (more top 3 positions)](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Abdallah requested access to SEMrush account or regular sharing of keyword ranking reports](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mariana and Mara to discuss templates for supporting timely news-adjacent content](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Share updated Looker dashboard link with Abdallah](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Explore options to give Abnormal team access to SEMrush data or establish regular reporting](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [Send Jennifer details on mobile formatting issues for glossary pages](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [Emily to complete review of content refresh candidates and share detailed notes](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and reporting on LLM mentions and traffic sources](https://fathom.video/share/q4jZJ9DsNEk9hsvmaijpWqBs93FGB5nS?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
